videos.description: Troy Williams gets picked off once again by Stanford, this time Justin Reid makes his fifth interception of the year.

videos.headline: Utah gets on the board with TD
videos.description: Zack Moss finds the gaps and rushes into the end zone for a 2-yard touchdown to give the Utes an early lead.

videos.headline: Chyrst's rushing TD gives Stanford the lead
videos.description: Keller Chryst fakes the hand off to confuse the defense and rush a 7-yard touchdown to give Stanford the lead.

videos.headline: Williams' deep pass gets Utes closer to FG
videos.description: Troy Williams pass connects with Raelon Singleton for 36-yard pass that would result in a field goal to tie the game.

videos.headline: Utah punter has costly mistake
videos.description: Mitch Wishnowsky has a costly mistake and bobbles the snap giving Stanford the ball on their own 15 which results in a field goal.

videos.headline: Utah QB Williams has costly turnover
videos.description: Troy Williams lobs the ball in the air and it's picked off by Stanford's Quenton Meeks for his first interception of the year.

videos.headline: Stanford OL ejected for targeting
videos.description: Stanford's Peter Kalambayi is ejected from the game for a helmet-to-helmet targeting call when he collided with Utah quarterback Troy Williams.

videos.headline: Stanford has a second player ejected for targeting
videos.description: Defensive tackle Harrison Phillips is ejected for a late hit on Utah quarterback Troy Williams.

videos.headline: Utah rallies late with TD
videos.description: Troy Williams passes to Darren Carrigton II for an 18-yard touchdown to chip away at Stanford's lead late in the game.
